news_items.title: Soul Player C64 – A real transformer running on a 1 MHz Commodore 64
OpenAI ad partner now selling ChatGPT ad placements based on “prompt relevance”
Figma's woes compound with Claude Design
NSA is using Anthropic's Mythos despite blacklist
OpenAI Announces GPT-5 Preview with Enhanced Reasoning
news_items.summary: OpenAI has released a preview of GPT-5, featuring significantly improved reasoning capabilities and multimodal understanding. The new model shows breakthrough performance on complex problem-solving tasks.

news_items.title: Anthropic Releases Claude 4 with Extended Context Window
news_items.summary: Anthropic announces Claude 4, featuring a 500K token context window and improved safety features. The model demonstrates superior performance on long-document analysis and code generation.

news_items.title: Google Gemini 2.0 Integrates Advanced MCP Protocol
news_items.summary: Google announces Gemini 2.0 with native Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, enabling seamless integration with external tools and data sources. This marks a significant step in AI agent capabilities.

news_items.title: New AI Coding Assistant Surpasses Human Developers in Benchmark
news_items.summary: A new AI coding assistant from Cursor AI has achieved unprecedented results in the SWE-bench, solving 85% of real-world GitHub issues autonomously. The tool uses advanced agent-based architecture.

news_items.title: MCP Protocol Adoption Reaches 10,000 Integrations
news_items.summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP), introduced by Anthropic, has reached a milestone of 10,000 integrations across various platforms and services, becoming the de facto standard for AI tool integration.

news_items.title: Meta Releases Llama 4 with 405B Parameters
news_items.summary: Meta AI announces Llama 4, their largest open-source language model with 405 billion parameters. The model shows competitive performance with proprietary models while maintaining open-source accessibility.

news_items.title: AI Agents Demonstrate Collaborative Problem-Solving in New Study
news_items.summary: Researchers publish groundbreaking study showing AI agents can effectively collaborate to solve complex multi-step problems, with performance exceeding individual agent capabilities by 40%.

news_items.title: ChatGPT Enterprise Adds Advanced Data Analysis Features
news_items.summary: OpenAI updates ChatGPT Enterprise with new data analysis capabilities, including real-time database connections, advanced visualization tools, and automated report generation.
